c.d: Total number of monthly active users globally, indicating network effect and likelihood friends are using the platform
c.s: Official company reports, app analytics platforms, market research firms

c.d: Number and diversity of communication methods available (text, voice, video, stories, status updates, group chats, etc.)
c.s: App store descriptions, feature documentation, user testing

c.d: Effectiveness and reliability of instant messaging, video calls, and live features for maintaining ongoing conversations
c.s: User reviews, technical performance tests, feature analysis

c.d: Ease of creating, managing, and participating in group conversations with multiple friends simultaneously
c.s: Feature documentation, user interface analysis, user feedback

c.d: Number of platforms and devices supported (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop) ensuring friends can connect regardless of device
c.s: App store listings, official website, platform documentation
